itinerary.title: TRAGUIN Premium Bihar Tour Package — Educational Bihar • Footsteps of Scholars & Emperors: Patna • Nalanda • Rajgir • Bodhgaya
itinerary.tagline: Educational Bihar • Patna • Nalanda • Rajgir • Bodhgaya • 04 Nights / 05 Days
itinerary.overview:
Welcome to an enriching historical journey curated exclusively by TRAGUIN. Embark on a premium Bihar Educational Tour specifically designed to immerse student cohorts into the breathtaking landscapes, glorious empires, and legendary seats of ancient knowledge.

TOUR OVERVIEW
This elite institutional field trip represents the ultimate premium Bihar experience for modern school groups. Travelling in a dedicated fleet of luxury AC multi-axle coaches accompanied by senior TRAGUIN tour managers, local historians, and certified medical assistance, safety is paired seamlessly with exploration. Featuring an all-inclusive buffet meal plan tailored for healthy, student-friendly dining, this route flows past iconic attractions effortlessly. Every student and educator will enjoy specialized TRAGUIN curated experiences including VIP monument entry, interactive group quizzes, and immersive storytelling workshops that transcend the boundaries of classroom textbooks.

WHY CHOOSE THE BEST BIHAR TOUR PACKAGE FOR STUDENTS?
When shortlisting a Luxury Bihar Holiday or student learning journey, educational institutions choose a path rich in ancient history, socio-political legacy, and cultural heritage. Bihar remains the cradle of ancient Indian civilization, from the ruins of the world-famous Nalanda University to the historic Cyclopean Walls of Rajgir.
itinerary.seo_title: BR-007 | Educational Bihar School Tour Patna Nalanda | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 04 Nights / 05 Days school educational tour (BR-007 / TRG-BIH-007): Patna, Nalanda, Rajgir, Bodhgaya, API meals, and 4-tier accommodation.

highlights.text: Patna arrival, Bihar Museum, Golghar orientation on Day 01
Nalanda University ruins and transfer to Rajgir on Day 02
Rajgir ropeway, Cyclopean Walls, Bodhgaya on Day 03
Mahabodhi Temple, international monasteries on Day 04
Bodhgaya to Patna departure on Day 05

days.title: ARRIVAL IN PATNA | LEGACY OF PATALIPUTRA – EXPLORING THE SEAT OF EMPIRES
days.description: Your educational premium Bihar experience begins as your student group lands at Patna Airport or arrives at the railway station, greeted warmly by the dedicated TRAGUIN logistics team. Board your luxury AC coach and transfer to your handpicked premium stay. After lunch, visit the futuristic Bihar Museum, a world-class architectural masterpiece holding treasures from the Maurya and Gupta eras. Next, explore the Golghar to understand historical grain storage systems and capture stunning photography points overlooking the holy Ganges.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Bihar Museum interactive galleries, Golghar, Gandhi Maidan promenade.
Evening Experience: An orientation seminar and ice-breaking educational briefing conducted by TRAGUIN experts.
Meals Included: Welcome Drink, Student Buffet Lunch & Dinner.

days.title: PATNA TO NALANDA & RAJGIR | ANCIENT KNOWLEDGE & THE GLORY OF THE FIRST UNIVERSITY
days.description: Depart early after a nutritious buffet breakfast towards Nalanda, a UNESCO World Heritage site and an essential anchor for any top-tier school excursion. Here, students will experience immersive storytelling while touring the extensive brick ruins of the 5th-century Nalanda University. Walk past ancient classrooms, monasteries, and grand libraries. Visit the Multimedia Nalanda Museum before continuing the drive through breathtaking landscapes to Rajgir, the ancient capital of Magadha.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Nalanda University Archaeological Ruins, Xuanzang Memorial Hall, Nalanda Museum.
Optional Activities: Inter-school interactive debate session on ancient versus modern education patterns.
Meals Included: Full Board (Breakfast, Lunch & Dinner).

days.title: RAJGIR EXPLORATION TO BODHGAYA | ROYAL FORTRESSES, ROPEWAYS & SPIRITUAL GEOGRAPHY
days.description: Embark on an exhilarating day exploring Rajgir's famous attractions. Ride the scenic aerial ropeway to the top of Ratnagiri Hill to witness the gleaming white Vishwa Shanti Stupa (Peace Pagoda). Explore the ancient Cyclopean Walls, Venu Vana, and Bimbisara Jail, offering real-world historical context to textbook chapters on Buddhism and Jainism. In the afternoon, take a picturesque drive to Bodhgaya, checking into a highly secure premium hotel.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Vishwa Shanti Stupa Ropeway, Gridhakuta Hill, Cyclopean Wall segments, Venu Vana.
Evening Experience: Peaceful group meditation walk around the outer ring of spiritual monuments.
Meals Included: Full Board (Breakfast, Institutional Lunch & Dinner).

days.title: BODHGAYA ENLIGHTENMENT TOUR | WORLD HERITAGE IMMERSION & GLOBAL ARCHITECTURE STUDY
days.description: Spend a magnificent day exploring Bodhgaya, the world's ultimate center for Buddhist learning. Visit the magnificent UNESCO World Heritage Mahabodhi Temple, standing beside the sacred Bodhi Tree where Prince Siddhartha attained supreme enlightenment. Students will learn about ancient stone carvings and global religious history. Later, visit the diverse international monasteries including the Japanese, Thai, and Tibetan temples to observe varied architectural styles.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Mahabodhi Temple, Sacred Bodhi Tree, Great Buddha Statue, Royal Thai Monastery.
Optional Activities: Live workshop with local artists focused on practicing authentic Madhubani painting.
Meals Included: Full Board (Breakfast, Lunch & Special Farewell Dinner).

days.title: BODHGAYA TO PATNA / DEPARTURE | CHERISHING UNFORGETTABLE MEMORIES BEYOND DESTINATIONS
days.description: Indulge in a final hearty breakfast at your premium hotel before boarding your luxury coach. Enjoy a relaxed drive back to Patna. Your coach will deliver the group directly to Patna Airport or Patna Junction Railway Station for your departure. Return home with expanded minds, rich academic journals, and unforgettable memories shaped beautifully by TRAGUIN.
activities: Transfers Included: Private luxury group drop-off with luggage assistance.
Meals Included: Sumptuous Buffet Breakfast & Packed Highway Lunch.

inclusions.text: Premium Stays: Triple/Quad sharing student setups in handpicked safe hotels.
Luxury Transportation: High-end AC Coaches with reliable, certified commercial drivers.
All-Inclusive Meal Plan: Daily nutritious breakfast, lunch, and dinner buffet (API).
TRAGUIN Support: 24/7 dedicated tour managers and on-board operations executive.
Complimentary Access: All pre-booked entry tickets to monuments and Rajgir ropeway passes.
Welcome Kit: Educational journals, student badges, hats, and maps for everyone.
Flights or train fares from your home institutional location.
Personal student purchases, laundry, and individual room service bills.
Any medical tests, specific customized health care, or individual insurance.
Optional specialized historic workshops not mentioned in the main track.
